title: Calley Arrives For Another Session: Lt. William Calley, who is accused of killing 102 Vietnamese civilians at My Lai in 1968, shields a cough with his hand as he arrives for another session of the court martial being held at Ft. Benning, Georgia. During Thursday's session four witnesses were heard, November 1970
author: Joe Holloway, Jr.

title: On "Memory Lane": "This is Memory Lane," Abbie Hoffman said, driving down Michigan Ave Saturday morning. "It's good to be home." author: Johanna Lawrenson
